creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
Yeah, I noticed this a couple weeks ago however all attempts to see if David Champion is hosting the patch at a different location (outside of archive.org's uchicago.edu) appear to have failed.

I believe bringing this patch back as a local patch is the best bet for now.  So yes please rebase it to 1.8.2 and I'll maintain it going forward.

However, what other patches are applying with fuzz?  Outside of vvv's all the other patches should apply with the exception of offset changes.
